scope.question: agent_run_recovery: The target senolytics-scaffold-bootstrap-2026-06-21 candidate still has a linked source_fidelity review with verdict needs_revision; this bounded repair only aligns lifecycle state and creates a repair candidate. The target candidate still lacks synthesis_boundary and taxonomy_mapping review lanes, so it is not promotion-ready. The repair candidate candidate-revision-senolytics-scaffold-bootstrap-2026-06-21-repair is submitted and still requires its source_fidelity, synthesis_boundary, and taxonomy_mapping supervisor review lanes.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks this bounded agent-run recovery repair without promoting any candidate.
Aligns the target agent-run status and blockers with the completed repair-candidate review state while preserving remaining scaffold-candidate limitations as separate next-action context.
